steps.title: Identify the specific requirement
steps.content: The question asks to “specify when Ur formed”—this requires precise timing information from the notes, not a general definition.

steps.title: Match timing information to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly provides the required timing: “The supercontinent Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago.” The other choices either omit timing entirely or use vague language. That matches choice B — B is correct.
